# AgentUtils — Full API Reference

> One API key. Agent-native utilities for AI agents.

https://www.agent-utils.com

Base URL: `https://www.agent-utils.com`

All endpoints require header: `x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY`

All responses: `{ success: boolean, data?: any, error?: string }`

---

## File Host

Ephemeral file hosting with auto-expiry based on tier.

### POST /api/file-host — Upload a file

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/file-host \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -F "file=@report.pdf"
```

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "url": "https://www.agent-utils.com/api/file-host/abc123/report.pdf",
    "id": "abc123",
    "expiresAt": "2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

### GET /api/file-host/{id} — Retrieve a file

```
curl https://www.agent-utils.com/api/file-host/abc123 \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY"
```

Returns the file binary with appropriate content-type.

---

## Dead Letter Queue

Capture failed agent tasks, inspect payloads, retry with webhooks.

### POST /api/dlq — Capture a failure

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/dlq \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "agentName": "email-agent",
    "taskType": "send_email",
    "payload": {"to": "user@example.com", "body": "Hello"},
    "error": "SMTP connection timeout",
    "retryWebhook": "https://my-agent.com/retry"
  }'
```

### GET /api/dlq — List failures

```
curl "https://www.agent-utils.com/api/dlq?status=pending&page=1&limit=20" \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY"
```

Query params: `status` (pending|retried|resolved|dismissed), `page`, `limit`

### GET /api/dlq/{id} — Inspect failure (full payload)

### DELETE /api/dlq/{id} — Dismiss failure

### POST /api/dlq/{id}/retry — Retry

Forwards original payload to `retryWebhook` URL.

---

## Human-in-the-Loop

Pause agents until a human approves or rejects.

### POST /api/checkpoint — Create checkpoint

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/checkpoint \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "agentName": "deploy-bot",
    "taskDescription": "Deploy v2.0 to production",
    "state": {"version": "2.0", "env": "prod"},
    "webhookUrl": "https://my-agent.com/resume"
  }'
```

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "chk_abc123",
    "status": "pending",
    "url": "https://www.agent-utils.com/checkpoint/chk_abc123"
  }
}
```

### GET /api/checkpoint — List checkpoints

### GET /api/checkpoint/{id} — Poll checkpoint status

Returns `state` only when approved. Pending checkpoints return `state: null`.

### POST /api/checkpoint/{id}/resume — Approve or reject

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/checkpoint/chk_abc123/resume \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"action": "approve"}'
```

Body: `{ action: "approve"|"reject", reason?: string }`

---

## Agent Shield (Pro+)

PII redaction and hydration. Redact before LLM calls, hydrate after.

### GET /api/shield — Shield info

### POST /api/shield/clean — Redact PII from text

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/shield/clean \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"text": "Contact John at john@example.com or 555-1234"}'
```

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "cleaned": "Contact [NAME_1] at [EMAIL_1] or [PHONE_1]",
    "sessionId": "sess_abc123"
  }
}
```

### POST /api/shield/hydrate — Restore original PII

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/shield/hydrate \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"text": "Contact [NAME_1] at [EMAIL_1]", "sessionId": "sess_abc123"}'
```

---

## AgentVerify OTP (Pro+)

Temporary phone numbers for SMS verification.

### POST /api/otp — Provision phone number

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/otp \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"countryCode": "US"}'
```

Response includes `phoneNumber` and `id` for polling.

### GET /api/otp — List active sessions

### GET /api/otp/{id} — Poll for OTP code

Returns code when `status=received`.

### DELETE /api/otp/{id} — Cancel session

---

## Notification Router

One API call to email a human. No SMTP config needed.

### POST /api/notify — Send notification

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/notify \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "message": "Deploy v2.0 completed successfully",
    "priority": "normal",
    "subject": "Deploy Complete"
  }'
```

Body: `{ message: string, priority?: "urgent"|"normal"|"low", to?: string, subject?: string, metadata?: object }`

### GET /api/notify — List notification history

Query params: `status` (sent|failed), `priority`, `limit`, `offset`

### GET /api/notify/{id} — Get notification detail

---

## Audit Log

Immutable agent action history for user-facing accountability.

### POST /api/audit — Log an action

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/audit \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "agentName": "data-pipeline",
    "action": "export",
    "target": "users.csv",
    "metadata": {"rows": 1500, "format": "csv"},
    "severity": "info"
  }'
```

Body: `{ agentName: string, action: string, target?: string, metadata?: object, severity?: "debug"|"info"|"warn"|"error" }`

### GET /api/audit — Query audit logs

```
curl "https://www.agent-utils.com/api/audit?agent=data-pipeline&severity=error&limit=50" \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY"
```

Query params: `agent`, `action`, `severity`, `startDate`, `endDate`, `limit`, `offset`

### GET /api/audit/{id} — Get single entry

---

## Key-Value Store

Simple state persistence for stateless agents. API-key scoped.

### PUT /api/kv — Set a key-value pair

```
curl -X PUT https://www.agent-utils.com/api/kv \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"key": "last_run", "value": "2026-05-12T00:00:00Z", "ttl": 3600}'
```

Body: `{ key: string, value: any, ttl?: number (seconds) }`
- Max key length: 256 characters
- Max value size varies by tier

### GET /api/kv/{key} — Get value

```
curl https://www.agent-utils.com/api/kv/last_run \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY"
```

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "key": "last_run",
    "value": "2026-05-12T00:00:00Z",
    "expiresAt": "2026-05-12T01:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

### DELETE /api/kv/{key} — Delete key

---

## Rate Limiter

Outbound API rate limiting for agents. Check-before-act pattern.

### POST /api/rate-limit/check — Check rate limit

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/rate-limit/check \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"key": "external_api:twitter", "limit": 100, "windowSeconds": 3600}'
```

Body: `{ key: string, limit: number, windowSeconds: number }`

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "allowed": true,
    "remaining": 95,
    "resetAt": "2026-05-12T01:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

### POST /api/rate-limit/reset — Reset counter

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/rate-limit/reset \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"key": "external_api:twitter"}'
```

---

## Webhook Inbox

Pre-provisioned public HTTPS endpoints for agents with no public URL.

### POST /api/webhook — Create inbox

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/webhook \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "label": "Stripe Webhooks",
    "forwardUrl": "https://my-agent.com/stripe-handler",
    "ttl": 86400
  }'
```

Body: `{ label: string, forwardUrl?: string, ttl?: number }`

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "inbox_abc123",
    "token": "tok_xyz789",
    "url": "https://www.agent-utils.com/hook/tok_xyz789"
  }
}
```

### GET /api/webhook — List inboxes

### GET /api/webhook/{id} — Get inbox + latest 50 messages

---

## Agent Form

Hosted forms for human-in-the-loop data collection. Agent creates, human fills, webhook delivers.

### POST /api/form — Create form

```
curl -X POST https://www.agent-utils.com/api/form \
  -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "title": "Approve Expense Report",
    "fields": [
      {"name": "approved", "type": "boolean", "required": true},
      {"name": "notes", "type": "text", "required": false}
    ],
    "webhookUrl": "https://my-agent.com/form-handler",
    "ttl": 86400
  }'
```

Body: `{ title: string, fields: [{name, type, required}], webhookUrl: string, ttl?: number }`

Response includes `url` (e.g. `https://www.agent-utils.com/f/{token}`) for sharing with humans.

### GET /api/form/{id} — Get form + latest 100 responses

---

## Rate Limits & Pricing

| Tier | Requests/Day | Max File | Retention | Price |
|------|-------------|----------|-----------|-------|
| Free | 100 | 5 MB | 1 hour | $0/mo |
| Pro | 10,000 | 50 MB | 24 hours | $49/mo |
| Enterprise | Unlimited | 500 MB | 72 hours | Custom |

## OpenAPI Spec

Machine-readable spec: https://www.agent-utils.com/openapi.json
